review_checklist: SEO target — keyword in H1/H2/first 100 words?
Depth — real data/research vs thin AI summary?
Internal linking — 2+ links to other blog posts?
Competitor comparison — honest, data-backed, not FUD

content_template.structure: H1 + meta desc → intro hook → body (H2 sections) → conclusion + CTA

kpi_defaults.measure: Ahrefs rank, organic traffic, blog→signup conversion >2%
